items.title: IBM Is an AI and IT Leader Set for Growth, Says Analyst. Plus, Lowe’s, Rocket, and More Stocks.
items.description: Lowe’s shares are seeing a relief rally, as third-quarter results cleared a very low bar, following weak results out of  Home Depot  Lowe’s comps slightly outperformed its larger peer, with that occurring only once in the prior eight quarters.  There’s upside near $1/share if gross margins get back above 3.25%, which is still far from the pandemic highs of 4.5% when the stock went public.
